title: Acoustic Folk Campfire
summary: Warm 96 BPM acoustic folk  -  fingerpicked guitar, mandolin, soft cajon, upright bass.
prompt: A warm acoustic folk instrumental at 96 BPM. Finger-picked steel-string guitar in a sunlit major key, soft brushed cajon keeping time, mandolin tremolo countermelody, low warm hum of an upright bass. Campfire-and-stars atmosphere, intimate close-miked production. Hopeful and grounded.
